name: Response Service Reads
description: Built-in Home Assistant response-service and calendar-event read tools.
capabilities: Calls Home Assistant services that return structured data.

built_in_toggle.shared_description: Expose Home Assistant services that return structured data, such as calendar and forecast reads.
built_in_toggle.profile_disable_description: Prevents this profile from using Home Assistant services that return structured data, such as calendar and forecast reads.
